name: maya-v4-gift
walkthrough_hook: I LIVE 200 MILES FROM MY NIECE
walkthrough_voiceover: I never get to read her bedtime stories. So I made one. Five questions. A note from auntie. Same day, sent right to her parents' inbox. Tonight's story is hers. The hero is... Maya.

spoken_captions.text: I never read her bedtime stories.
